minting_now.description:
Burbella in the Sundae Sky
This is a fantastic and highly imaginative collection where Burbella, a candy bubble, lives and creates her adventures in a world just for children, because they are the ones who dream the unimaginable in their childhood fantasies.
Edited, animated, and improvised using de

minting_now.name: How Deep Do We Dive? [Stem]
minting_now.description:
Original Stem for 'How Deep Do We Dive?' available for free minting.

Artificial Intelligence(AI) will never replace our humanity’s gifts of intuition, passion and imagination.
Conscious life on Earth is a miracle, and love has the answer.

minting_now.name: ATLAS/31
minting_now.description:
ATLAS/31
From  a current collection : https://opensea.io/collection/atlas-31
A hand-drawn cartoon NFT based on a meme about interstellar comet 31/ATLAS (its name is intentionally reversed). This is a closed edition, and each NFT is unique. To create an engaging design, it has been edited, animated,

minting_now.name: CKCG Cottages
minting_now.description: Oil paintings of cottages and houses in beautiful landscapes created to inspire the soul and relax the mind. These are one off never to be offered again unique NFTs.

minting_now.name: Gravitational pull
minting_now.description:
Title: Spectrum of Silence

"Find Yourself" showed the destination; this work reveals the cost.
The star here is the same guiding light from Spectrum of Silence, but instead of offering rest, it now exerts force. The fracturing red planet symbolizes the ego breaking under the weight of transformatio

minting_now.name: Apes Bunitori Club
minting_now.description:
Welcome to the Apes Bunitori Club! 🐒
Apes Bunitori Club is a unique NFT collection bringing together an exclusive community of collectors and digital art enthusiasts. Each ape is one of a kind, featuring distinctive traits that combine creativity and bold design.

🌟 Why choose this collection?

minting_now.name: Void Divers
minting_now.description: Set in the pixelated dimension of The Deep Void, these divers are the first brave souls to plunge beyond known data streams.

minting_now.name: Pixel Of Soul
minting_now.description: PixelOfSoul is a rebellious NFT collection where every character represents a broken soul in digital form. Born from chaos and shaped by attitude, these pixel beings carry unique traits, emotions, and stories that live forever on the blockchain.

Drop Ded Gorgez is an original NFT collection of 8,888 unique beings, forged through a ritual of chaos and order.
A celebration of art, identity, and world-building where each Gorgez plays a role in the evolving universe of Los Gorgez.

We’re still floating from the energy of ApeFest ‘22. Thank you to everyone - our community, the staff, vendors, performers and our sponsor - for making this year’s event so memorable. Scroll the for some of our favorite moments and photos from last week:

Apes, We’ve hit the 1M follower milestone!Join our Twitter Space tomorrow at 9pm ET to celebrate all that has been BAYC over the past year and a half with our co-hosts . Come hang in this celebratory community chat.
ApeCoin Introducing ApeCoin ($APE), a token for culture, gaming, and commerce used to empower a decentralized community building at the forefront of web3.

Play now: [PudgyWorld.com](https://t.co/x7lkMt8Rre) We're hosting an NFT founders meet up for Consensus Miami. If you're going to be in Miami for Consensus and work in NFTs you are invited (limited spots availabl...

Pudgy Penguins are returning to Las Vegas for this year’s Licensing Expo. For the third year in a row, we’re excited to represent Web3 and share the floor with some of the world’s greatest IPs from May 19 to 21.
NEWS: teams up with , enabling to potentially reach 500M+ investors across major trading platforms worldwide. Paxos Crypto Brokerage has also added support for PENGU.
Make your move. To all the new players and holders joining Azuki: Welcome to the Garden

From the Alley to the Garden We heard you like to move it. Madagascar. 2271km from north to south. 3 weeks. Together. 1 lucky winner takes home a pair of Shokz OpenRun Pro earphones (Kipchoge Edition) + Azuki "In the Moment" cap. Registration open Locals @ Azuki HQ Tomorrow (Tue 4/21) at 6:30pm, See you there!
